sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section II, List of Answers on Topics 36:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section II, List of Answers on Topics 36:1
items.html: Reflected light is nothing more than a light that was intended for phase four, which is Malchut. Because Malchut did not receive this light within her, this light became a garment and a receptacle for all nine Sefirot above her. Thus, Malchut is the origin for all the ten Sefirot of the reflected light and is therefore regarded as the Keter of the reflected light. (Inner Observation, Item 102)
